title: Holistic Nursing in Practice: Mindfulness-Based Yoga as an Intervention to Manage Stress and Burnout
journal: Journal of holistic nursing : official journal of the American Holistic Nurses' Association
headline: Holistic Nursing in Practice: Mindfulness-Based Yoga as an Intervention to Manage Stress and Burnout
summary: A randomized controlled trial of yoga examined sleep. Effects of a mindfulness-based (MB) yoga practice on stress, burnout, and indicators of well-being among nurses and health care professionals (HCPs).
keyFindings: Effects of a mindfulness-based (MB) yoga practice on stress, burnout, and indicators of well-being among nurses and health care professionals (HCPs).
limitations: Single-trial result; requires replication, and self-reported outcomes may inflate apparent effects.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.

journalName: Journal of holistic nursing : official journal of the American Holistic Nurses' Association
